computed.name: CQP_TOTAL_CLAIMS_COMBINED_AVERAGE/2
CQP_INCEPTION_DATE (AS IF)
CQP_EXPIRATION_DATE (AS IF)
CQP_TOTAL_ESTIMATED_USD  (AS IF)
CQP_TAX_USD (AS IF)
CQP_MLI_TOTAL_FORTE_USD (AS IF)
'=CQP_GWP_USD-(CQP_GWP_USD*(CQP_BROKERAGE_COMISSION+CQP_TAX))
=CQP_CLAIM_USD/CQP_GWP_USD
=CQP_BROKERAGE_COMISSION + CQP_TAX + CQP_LOSS_RADIO + CQP_UNDERWRITING_EXPENSES
